faqs.question: Is the college AICTE approved?
faqs.answer: Yes, Institute of Technology & Management (ITM), Gwalior is approved by AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education). B.Tech courses are affiliated to RGPV (Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya), Bhopal.

faqs.question: What is the placement record?
faqs.answer: Our placement rate is 90% with an average package of ₹5.5 LPA and highest package of ₹18 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, Accenture, Tech Mahindra, Cognizant and more.

faqs.question: Is there a transport facility?
faqs.answer: Yes, the college provides bus service covering major areas of Gwalior city and nearby regions. Monthly bus pass is available at ₹1,200/month.

faqs.question: Can I change my course after admission?
faqs.answer: Course change requests are entertained within the first 30 days of admission, subject to seat availability and eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: What is the medium of instruction?
faqs.answer: The medium of instruction is English for all technical programs (B.Tech, M.Tech). Hindi is used as a supplementary language for better understanding.

faqs.question: Are there any lateral entry admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, lateral entry is available for B.Tech (2nd year) for diploma holders with 60% marks through RGPV lateral entry counselling. Direct 2nd year admission based on merit.

faqs.question: What is the library timing?
faqs.answer: The central library is open Monday to Saturday from 8 AM to 8 PM. Digital library resources are available 24/7 online.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for BBA and BCA?
faqs.answer: BBA and BCA admissions at ITM Gwalior are direct (merit-based on 12th marks). No separate entrance exam is required.

faqs.question: Which university is B.Tech affiliated to?
faqs.answer: B.Tech courses at ITM Gwalior are affiliated to Rajiv Gandhi Proudyogiki Vishwavidyalaya (RGPV), Bhopal. Degree is awarded by RGPV.
